detectors.description:
Reentrancy in EoS._transfer(address,address,uint256) (EoS.sol#649-773):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (EoS.sol#713)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (EoS.sol#787-799)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (EoS.sol#719)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (EoS.sol#807)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (EoS.sol#771)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (EoS.sol#943)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (EoS.sol#923)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (EoS.sol#925)
	EoS._rOwned (EoS.sol#325) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- EoS._takeTeam(uint256) (EoS.sol#937-945)
	- EoS._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (EoS.sol#897-933)
	- EoS.balanceOf(address) (EoS.sol#475-479)
	- EoS.constructor() (EoS.sol#409-439)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (EoS.sol#771)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (EoS.sol#951)
	EoS._rTotal (EoS.sol#337) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- EoS._getCurrentSupply() (EoS.sol#1093-1103)
	- EoS._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (EoS.sol#949-955)
	- EoS.constructor() (EoS.sol#409-439)
	- EoS.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (EoS.sol#571-593)
